name: previeworch
description: PreviewOrch: small Docker-based PR preview orchestration for GitHub pull requests.

scripts.build:node: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && mkdir -p dist/src dist/src/public && cp -R src/views dist/src/views && cp -R src/public/. dist/src/public/
scripts.build: npm run build:node && npm run build:client
scripts.dev: npm run build && (tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput & TSC_PID=$!; trap 'kill $TSC_PID' EXIT INT TERM; node --env-file=.env --watch --watch-preserve-output dist/src/server.js)
